mnemonics.title: TestAndSet Steps
mnemonics.content: RSR - Read original value, Set to true, Return original. Sequence for atomic hardware operation

mnemonics.title: Testing Phases
mnemonics.content: U Inhale Slowly: Unit -> Integration -> System. Order of testing granularity
FSR Techniques: Fault injection, Stress testing, Regression testing. 'Find Serious Regressions'
mnemonics.title: Testing Methods
OS Test Targets
mnemonics.content: KSM: Kernel, Scheduler, Memory manager. 'Keep Systems Managed' through testing

acronyms.usage: Hardware instruction for implementing locks atomically
Method to intentionally introduce errors for robustness checks

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a bathroom door lock - check if occupied (read), flip to 'engaged' (set), tell user status (return)
3-story building: Basement (Unit), Ground (Integration), Roof (System) - test from bottom up
Picture injecting colored dye into pipes to find leaks in a system
Visualize stacking weights on a bridge until it creaks - finding load limits

analogies.analogy: Like a restaurant host - checks if table is free (read), marks it occupied (set), tells you availability (return)
Like a vaccine - introduces weakened bugs to build system immunity
Like rechecking all doors after house renovation - ensure old fixes still work
